files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIAction
files.Summary: Represents the types of actions an AI can take.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIDecision
files.Summary: Represents a decision made by the AI, including the action and relevant parameters.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIDecisionGenerator
files.Summary: Generates all possible AI actions for evaluation.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIEvaluator
files.Summary: Evaluates and scores AI actions and targets.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIPersonality
files.Summary: Defines different AI personality types that determine decision-making behavior.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIUtilities
files.Summary: Static utility methods for AI decision-making.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.BattleState
files.Summary: Read-only snapshot of battle state for AI decision making. Does not reference GameManager - actions are executed by the caller.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.EnemyAIBehavior
files.Summary: Base class for enemy AI behaviors. Attach this as a child node to enemy UnitSystem nodes. Encapsulates decision-making logic for a single enemy unit.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Ally1Data
files.Summary: Ally1 — friendly AI-controlled guest unit, Light-magic supporter.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AssassinData
files.Summary: Assassin – Glass cannon unit. Extremely high ATK with low HP and DEF. Specialises in burst damage, execution, and life steal.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AssassinStab
files.Summary: Enemy Assassin's basic ranged stab (slightly extended reach).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Audio.AudioBus
files.Summary: Logical mixing channels exposed by the audio service.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Audio.AudioCatalog
files.Summary: Single source of truth for every audio track shipped with the game.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Audio.AudioRegistry
files.Summary: In-memory backed by an ordered dictionary.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Audio.AudioTrack
files.Summary: Static metadata describing one playable audio asset.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Audio.AudioVolumeMath
files.Summary: Pure-C# math helpers shared by the audio service for converting between the 0..1 linear scale stored in user settings and the decibel scale Godot's AudioServer consumes.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Audio.IAudioRegistry
files.Summary: Lookup table for every known to the game.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Audio.IAudioService
files.Summary: Contract for the central audio service.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.BasicAttackSkill
files.Summary: Basic ranged attack skill for the archer enemy.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.BladeDance
files.Summary: Blade Dance – Attacks up to 3 adjacent enemies in sequence.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.BloodDrain
files.Summary: Blood Drain – Drains life from the target: deals ATK damage and heals caster for 30%.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.BurningSlash
files.Summary: Burning Slash – Slashes the enemy and applies Burning for 2 turns.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.CircularStrike
files.Summary: Circular Strike – Deals damage to ALL adjacent enemies (AOE melee).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.CleansingLight
files.Summary: Cleansing Light – Removes all status effects from one ally. Currently removes all active effects via the effect list.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.CounterStance
files.Summary: Counter Stance – Boosts own DEF and ATK for 2 turns (self-buff).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.CriticalStrike
files.Summary: Critical Strike – Deals 200% ATK to a single enemy. 3-turn cooldown.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.CrushingStrike
files.Summary: Crushing Strike – Deals heavy damage to a single adjacent enemy. Scaling: 150% of TotalAtk.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Corruption.CorruptedTransformationEffect
files.Summary: Time-limited effect that turns its bearer into an uncontrollable monster.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Corruption.CorruptionLevel1Effect
files.Summary: Level 1 corruption: -10% healing received, -1 range to all skills.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Corruption.CorruptionLevel2Effect
files.Summary: Level 2 corruption: -15% speed, chance to attack a random ally on its turn.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Corruption.CorruptionLevel3Effect
files.Summary: Level 3 corruption: imminent transformation into an uncontrollable monster.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Corruption.CorruptionLevelEffect
files.Summary: Base class for the three corruption-tier marker effects. Permanent (duration -1) and non-stackable; swaps them in/out as the tier changes.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Corruption.CorruptionSystem
files.Summary: Static facade owning every corruption mechanic: backlash rolls, level changes, transformation, faction conversion.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.EntityProfile
files.Summary: Designer-authored display metadata attached to a combatant.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.ArmyOfTheDead
files.Summary: Armée des Morts — Army of the Dead. Temporarily summons corpses (placeholder).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.BladeDance
files.Summary: Danse des Lames — Dance of Blades. Strikes up to 3 adjacent enemies.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.Block
files.Summary: Block — Block. Apply a 50% damage-reduction shield to self for 1 turn.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.BloodStrike
files.Summary: Frappe Sanguine — Blood Strike. Damages and heals the caster for 20% of damage dealt.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.BruteForce
files.Summary: Force Brute — +10% melee damage. Apply at battle start; not invoked.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.Charge
files.Summary: Charge — linear movement + attack. The target MUST be on the same row or column as the caster (no diagonals). The caster slides along that axis and stops on the tile immediately before the target, then strikes for 120% ATK.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.CircularStrike
files.Summary: Frappe Circulaire — Circular Strike. Hits every adjacent enemy.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.CorruptedConversion
files.Summary: Conversion Corrompue — the hallmark Darkness-school spell.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.CrashingWave
files.Summary: Vague Déferlante — Crashing Wave. Knocks enemies back, extinguishes fires.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.CriticalStrike
files.Summary: Coup Critique — Critical Strike. Double damage. CD 3 (doc-fixed).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.CrushingStrike
files.Summary: Frappe Écrasante — Crushing Strike. +50% damage; can stun the target.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.CursedOrb
files.Summary: Orbe Maudit — Cursed Orb. Weakens the target.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.DarkPact
files.Summary: Pacte Sombre — Dark Pact. Sacrifice HP to boost magic.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.DivineJudgment
files.Summary: Jugement Divin — Divine Judgment. Lightning strike, +200% damage vs corrupted.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.DivinePrayer
files.Summary: Prière Divine — Divine Prayer. +Status resistance for 3 turns.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.DragonsBreath
files.Summary: Souffle du Dragon — Dragon's Breath. Wide cone of fire.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.Execution
files.Summary: Exécution — Execute. Instantly kills an enemy below 15% HP.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.ExecutionerBlade
files.Summary: Lame d'Exécution — Execution Blade. +50% damage to targets below 30% HP.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.Fireball
files.Summary: Boule de Feu — Fireball. Damage + burn for 3 turns.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.Flamestorm
files.Summary: Tempête Ardente — Burning Storm. 3×3 area damage that ignites the terrain.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.FlashFreeze
files.Summary: Glaciation Instantanée — Instant Glaciation. 50% chance to stun in a small area.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.FrostArrow
files.Summary: Flèche de Givre — Frost Arrow. Stuns the target for 1 turn.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.GallantStrike
files.Summary: Coup de Bravoure — Brave Strike. Self-buff: -50% damage taken + counter for 1 turn.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.GraniteSkin
files.Summary: Peau de Granit — Granite Skin. +DEF to ally for 3 turns.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.HawkEye
files.Summary: Œil de Faucon — Hawk's Eye. +2 range for 1 turn (modelled as ATK buff stand-in).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.HealingRain
files.Summary: Pluie Guérisseuse — Healing Rain. Light heal on every ally.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.L10n
files.Summary: Tiny localisation indirection so future i18n is a 1-line swap per call site.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.LightningStrike
files.Summary: Frappe Éclair — Lightning Strike. Rush + +20% damage at range 5.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.MultiShot
files.Summary: Pluie de Flèches — Arrow Rain. AoE damage in a 3×3 zone.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.PhantomStrike
files.Summary: Frappe Fantôme — Phantom Strike. Reach attack at 2 tiles distance.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.PiercingShot
files.Summary: Flèche Perforante — Piercing Arrow. Pierces up to 2 aligned enemies.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.PoisonArrow
files.Summary: Flèche Empoisonnée — Poison Arrow. Burning DOT 3 turns (poison stand-in).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.ProtectiveBubble
files.Summary: Bulle de Protection — Protection Bubble. Shield an ally for 1 turn.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.PurifyingFlash
files.Summary: Éclat Purificateur — Purifying Burst. Removes every status effect from one ally.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.PyromanticBurst
files.Summary: Explosion Pyromantique — Pyromantic Explosion. Consumes ALL mana for devastating damage.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.Recklessness
files.Summary: Témérité — +5% damage per 25% missing HP. Wired in damage formula, not as a Use().

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.Resurrection
files.Summary: Résurrection — Resurrection. Revives a fallen ally with 50% HP.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.Riposte
files.Summary: Riposte — 30% chance to counterattack after a melee hit.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.SacredRay
files.Summary: Rayon Sacré — Sacred Ray. Damages enemies, heals allies in its line.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.SeismicWave
files.Summary: Onde Sismique — Seismic Wave. Knocks enemies down in a line; 70% Stun chance.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.ShadowChains
files.Summary: Lame d'Ombre — Shadow Blade. Ignores defense, drains life.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.ShadowStrike
files.Summary: Coup d'Ombre — Shadow Strike. Attacks without breaking invisibility.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.SkillStrings
files.Summary: Single source of truth for every skill's display name and description string.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.SpectralBlade
files.Summary: Lame Spectrale — ignores 15% of enemy armor.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.StoneFortress
files.Summary: Forteresse de Pierre — Stone Fortress. Wall blocking movement (placeholder).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.StoneSpike
files.Summary: Lance de Roc — Rock Spear. Pierces armor.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.TaintedBlood
files.Summary: Sang Corrompu — Corrupted Blood. Reduces regen and healing on target.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.TitanAvatar
files.Summary: Avatar du Titan — Titan Avatar. Temporary stone-colossus form.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.Vanish
files.Summary: Vanish — Vanish. Become invisible until end of next turn.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.WallOfFlames
files.Summary: Mur de Flammes — Wall of Flames. Barrier; placeholder until terrain effects land.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.WarCry
files.Summary: Cri de Guerre — War Cry. +15% Atk/Def to nearby allies for 3 turns.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.WarriorEndurance
files.Summary: Endurance Guerrière — -15% damage taken after a successful melee strike.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.WaterJet
files.Summary: Jet d'Eau — Water Jet. Moderate damage + slow.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Data.Skills.WayOfTheBlade
files.Summary: Danse du Lame (passive) — +10% crit chance if the unit moved before attacking.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.DivinePrayer
files.Summary: Divine Prayer – Boosts ATK of all allies for 3 turns.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.EnemyArcher
files.Summary: Archer enemy unit with ranged attack AI behavior. Uses the existing AI system to make tactical decisions.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.EnemyAssassin
files.Summary: Enemy Assassin – Fast, fragile enemy that poisons and deals burst damage. Mirrors in role and stat profile.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.EnemyBurningSlash
files.Summary: Enemy Swordsman's special: a burning slash with fire damage-over-time.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.EnemyFighter
files.Summary: Enemy Fighter – Melee tank enemy with high HP, DEF, and a stun special. Mirrors in role and stat profile.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.EnemyHealAlly
files.Summary: Enemy Light Mage's special: heals the most wounded ally.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.EnemyLightMage
files.Summary: Enemy Light Mage – Support enemy that heals allies and fires light bolts. Mirrors in role and stat profile. Assigned Defensive personality so the AI prioritises keeping allies alive.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.EnemyPoisonStrike
files.Summary: Enemy Assassin's special: a poison-laced strike (placeholder using BurningEffect). Replace with PoisonEffect when implemented.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.EnemySoldier
files.Summary: Generic configurable enemy soldier — every stat, name, and portrait can be overridden from the Inspector so a designer can drop an instance into any battle scene and shape it without touching the script.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.EnemyStaggeringBlow
files.Summary: Enemy Fighter's special: a stun blow that also deals damage.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.EnemySwordsman
files.Summary: Enemy Swordsman – Balanced melee enemy with a burning slash special. Mirrors in role and stat profile.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.ExecutionBlade
files.Summary: Execution Blade – Deals 200% ATK to a target below 30% HP. No bonus if the target is above the threshold.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.FighterData
files.Summary: Fighter – Melee tank unit with high HP and DEF. Excels at absorbing damage and controlling nearby enemies.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.FighterMeleeAttack
files.Summary: Enemy Fighter's melee basic attack.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.HealingTouch
files.Summary: Healing Touch – Restores a flat amount of HP to one ally.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Helpers.Managers.TestAudioManager
files.Summary: Test-time subclass that exposes 's singleton hooks for reflection-driven test setup and bypasses the noisy startup logging.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Helpers.Systems.TestConcreteEffectTarget<TTarget>
files.Summary: Test double for EffectTarget{TTarget}. Allows verifying that effects are added/removed correctly.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Helpers.Systems.TestConcreteUnitSystem
files.Summary: Concrete test-double for IUnitSystem. Matches the testing style and philosophy of TestConcreteMapSystem.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.InstantKill
files.Summary: Instant Kill – Instantly defeats a target below 15% HP. Deals normal ATK damage otherwise.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.IntegrationTests.Managers.AudioManagerTest
files.Summary: Engine-level coverage for . These tests touch AudioServer directly so they have to run inside the Godot runtime.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.IntegrationTests.Systems.FactionMarkerTest
files.Summary:
Coverage for — the small floating arrow above each unit that's colour-coded by faction. The marker itself has no gameplay logic, but it's how the player visually identifies whose side a unit is on, so a regression here makes the battlefield unreadable. Tests verify:

  • assigns a faction-distinct colour.
  • brightens the marker for the active turn.
  • The marker mounts a child and floats above its parent.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.IntegrationTests.UI.BattleHudTest
files.Summary: Coverage for — the programmatic HUD root.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.IntegrationTests.UI.GameOverScreenTest
files.Summary: Coverage for — the Defeat overlay shown when the entire player party falls. Specifically tests the spam-click guard added after the user reported triple-firing the Try Again handler. Without it, a fast triple-click queued three ReloadCurrentScene calls in a row.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.KaelenVoss
files.Summary: Kaelen Voss — level 1 fighter, named protagonist of the prison-break encounter.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.LightBolt
files.Summary: Enemy Light Mage's basic magic attack.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.LightMageData
files.Summary: Light Mage – Support/healer unit. Low ATK and DEF but high Intelligence and Mana. Specialises in healing, cleansing, reviving and buffing allies.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Main
files.Summary: Main scene controller that initializes the game systems. Follows the Component-Based Architecture and event-driven communication.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.AudioManager
files.Summary: Centralised audio service for music, ambient layers and one-shot SFX. Implements from the Core layer and bridges Godot audio APIs to the rest of the game.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.BaseManager
files.Summary: Base class for all manager singletons in the game. Implements the Manager Pattern from your architecture documentation.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.BattleLauncher
files.Summary: Autoload that owns the exploration ↔ battle transition.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.GameManager
files.Summary: partial — indicator updates, hover ray-cast, cancel, warnings, A* tween-animated movement, and the HUD event handlers wired by GameManagerHud.WireHudEvents.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.KarmaManager
files.Summary: Holds the player party's global karma value in [-100, +100].

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.MenuManager
files.Summary: Manages menu navigation and state. Coordinates between different menus following the Manager Pattern.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SceneManager
files.Summary: The SceneManager handles every inside level related informations.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SettingsData
files.Summary: Data structure for settings storage

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SettingsManager
files.Summary: Manages game settings and provides centralized access to configuration options. Follows the Manager Pattern from your architecture.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.State
files.Summary: Base class for all states used in a . Provides a lifecycle and hooks for behavior implementation.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.StateMachine
files.Summary: Represents a finite state machine that manages transitions between different states. Each child node of this node is expected to be a .

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.TurnManager
files.Summary: partial — adds three-faction support, an upcoming-queue getter for the HUD turn-order widget, and an event.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.MercenaryAlly
files.Summary: Mercenary — level 1 fighter, AI-controlled friendly guest.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.PhantomStrike
files.Summary: Phantom Strike – Ranged sword slash that ignores DEF partially. Deals 120% ATK at range 2 with a DEF penetration flavour (implemented as raw damage).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Player1Data
files.Summary: Player1 — the test scene's player-controlled fighter.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Player2Data
files.Summary: Player2 — second player-controlled unit, Swordsman loadout.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.PoisonBlade
files.Summary: Poison Blade – Deals light damage and applies BurningEffect as a stand-in for Poison (to be replaced with PoisonEffect once implemented).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Resurrection
files.Summary: Resurrection – Revives a fallen ally with 50% HP. Uses OnEffectRevive which checks IsAlive internally.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.SacredRay
files.Summary: Sacred Ray – Deals Light damage to one enemy and heals the first ally in line. Implemented as a targeted damage + self-heal hybrid.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.ShadowStrike
files.Summary: Shadow Strike – Attacks at range 2 from stealth (raw damage, no DEF reduction).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.ShieldBash
files.Summary: Shield Bash – Reduces the target's DEF for 2 turns. Uses a DefDebuffer (simple flat DEF reduction via AtkBuffer pattern on Def stat).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.StaggeringBlow
files.Summary: Staggering Blow – Deals damage and stuns the target for 1 turn.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.SwordsmanData
files.Summary: Swordsman – Balanced melee unit with solid offense and versatile skills.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.SwordsmanSlash
files.Summary: Enemy Swordsman's basic melee attack.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.Battle.BattleNotifications.Severity
files.Summary: Severity tag — the HUD usually colour-codes the line based on this.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.Battle.BattleNotifications
files.Summary: Simple decoupled notification hub used to surface user-facing battle messages (warnings, info, deaths, etc.) without coupling producers to the HUD widgets.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.Battle.BattleSetup
files.Summary: Declarative description of an encounter — who fights, on which map, and where to return when the battle resolves. Built by the exploration layer (an on a story-quest NPC, a procedural encounter generator, etc.) and handed to .

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.Battle.FactionMarker
files.Summary: Small downward-pointing arrow that floats above a unit, colour-coded by faction.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.Battle.IndicatorOverlay
files.Summary: Bundles three world-space tile overlays — move (green), skill target (red), hover (yellow) — under a single facade.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.Battle.MoveIndicator
files.Summary: World-space overlay that draws a translucent quad above each cell in a list.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.Battle.NpcBattleTrigger
files.Summary: Drop this on an NPC node in an exploration scene to make that NPC launch a configurable battle when the player interacts with them.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.Battle.Pathfinder
files.Summary: Stateless grid path-finder. Runs BFS with parent tracking on an to find the shortest walkable path between two cells.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.BattleInputSystem
files.Summary: Central system responsible for handling player inputs during battle phases.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.CellInformation
files.Summary: Represents the information for a single grid cell in the map, including its coordinates, ground type, walkability, and the unit occupying it.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.EffectTarget<TTarget>
files.Summary: Base class for any entity that can receive and manage s. Provides default implementations for applying, removing, and querying effects.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.Faction
files.Summary: Identifies which side a combatant fights for.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.FactionExtensions
files.Summary: Convenience helpers for reasoning about relationships.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.IEffectTarget<TTarget>
files.Summary: Represents any entity that can receive and manage s.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.IInteractable
files.Summary: Defines a contract for objects that can be interacted with by the player. Implementing classes handle interaction logic, availability checks, and optional UI feedback such as prompts.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.IInteractor
files.Summary: Represents an entity capable of initiating interactions with interactable objects.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.IStatusEffect
files.Summary: Empty interface to be able to contain any status effect as the actual abstract class cannot take object as the TTarget

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.IStatusEffectBehavior
files.Summary: Defines the behavior contract for status effects applied to an entity.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.IUnitSystem
files.Summary: Contract for every combatant in the battle layer.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.MapSystem
files.Summary: Base class for all playable maps in the game.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.SkillSystem
files.Summary: Base class for all skills available in the game.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.StatusEffect<TTarget>
files.Summary: Base class for all status effects that can be applied to an .

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.StatusEffectSystem
files.Summary: Manages the lifecycle and application of s for all tracked targets in the game, including units and map cells.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.UnitSystem
files.Summary: Base class for all units in the tactical grid-based system. Handles stats, movement, effects, and Godot integration.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Hud.ActionMenu
files.Summary: Bottom-centre action bar for the active player unit.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Hud.BattleHud
files.Summary: Root that hosts every battle HUD widget.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Hud.BattleLog
files.Summary: Scrolling log subscribed to .

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Hud.ContextInfoPanel
files.Summary: Top-left context panel that swaps content based on the player's input mode.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Hud.EnemyRoster
files.Summary: Top-right column showing one per enemy.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Hud.GameOverScreen
files.Summary: Full-screen Game-Over overlay shown when the entire player party is defeated.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Hud.HudStyle
files.Summary: Shared visual constants and helpers for every HUD widget — colours, panel styles, bar styles, label / button theme overrides.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Hud.PlayerStatusPanel
files.Summary: Bottom-left panel showing the active controlled unit's name, HP and MP.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Hud.SkillSelector
files.Summary: Five-slot skill bar matching 's hot-keys (battle_select_skill1 .. battle_select_skill5).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Hud.TurnOrderQueue
files.Summary: Top-centre strip showing the next units to act, rendered as portrait chips with a faction-coloured border.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Hud.UnitHealthBar
files.Summary: Compact HP/MP indicator bound to a single .

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Hud.VictoryScreen
files.Summary: Full-screen victory overlay shown when the player wins a battle.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.MainMenu
files.Summary: Main menu controller that handles user interactions and navigation. Implements the Manager Pattern from your architecture documentation.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu
files.Summary: Options menu that allows players to configure game settings. Follows the Component-Based Architecture and event-driven communication. Implements the Manager Pattern for centralized settings management.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.CellType
files.Summary: Enumeration of every cell type available in the game.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.ClickOnMapContext
files.Summary: Defines the current interaction mode when clicking on the map.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.EffectType
files.Summary: Defines the type of effect applied by a skill or status effect.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.GameOutcome
files.Summary: Represents the outcome of a battle.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.MagicType
files.Summary: Represents the elemental type of a skill.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.ModifierType
files.Summary: Defines how a numerical modifier affects a value.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.StatTypeWithModifier
files.Summary: Represents a stat that can receive modifiers.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.TargetTypes
files.Summary: Defines the targeting pattern of a skill.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.TurnState
files.Summary: Defines the possible turn states in the battle system.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.UnitType
files.Summary: Represents the different unit archetypes in the game.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures
files.Summary: Provides shared data structures and enumerations used across the game systems.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.WarCry
files.Summary: War Cry – Boosts the ATK of all nearby allies for 3 turns.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.data.npc.Soldier
files.Summary: Hostile NPC that triggers a battle when the player interacts with them.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.player.AovPlayer
files.Summary: Represents the main player character in the game. Handles movement, gravity, and initialization of required nodes.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.player.ExplorationCamera
files.Summary: Camera controller for exploration mode. Handles mouse input to rotate the camera using a SpringArm3D.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleConfig
files.Summary: Declarative description of a battle encounter.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleEventBus
files.Summary: Central typed event dispatcher for the combat layer.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleEvents.BattleEnded
files.Summary: Emitted when the battle ends (victory, defeat, retreat).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleEvents.BattleStarted
files.Summary: Emitted once when a battle begins, after units and HUD are ready.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleEvents.CorruptionChanged
files.Summary: Emitted when a unit's corruption level changes.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleEvents.FactionChanged
files.Summary: Emitted when a unit switches faction (e.g. a corruption spell turning an ally into an enemy for 3 turns).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleEvents.HpChanged
files.Summary: Emitted whenever a unit's HP changes.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleEvents.ItemUsed
files.Summary: Emitted when a unit consumes an item from the shared inventory.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleEvents.KarmaChanged
files.Summary: Emitted when global karma changes (mostly outside combat, but the HUD may want to display it in case dialogue happens mid-fight).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleEvents.LogMessage
files.Summary: Free-form log line for the on-screen battle log.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleEvents.ManaChanged
files.Summary: Emitted whenever a unit's mana changes.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleEvents.SkillUsed
files.Summary: Emitted when a unit casts a skill.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleEvents.StatusEffectApplied
files.Summary: Emitted when a status effect is applied to a unit.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleEvents.StatusEffectRemoved
files.Summary: Emitted when a status effect ends or is cleansed.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleEvents.TurnEnded
files.Summary: Emitted when the active unit finishes its turn.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleEvents.TurnOrderChanged
files.Summary: Emitted when the recomputed turn order changes (initial sort, speed change, unit death, etc.). HUD turn-queue uses this.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleEvents.TurnStarted
files.Summary: Emitted when a new unit's turn begins.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleEvents.UnitDied
files.Summary: Emitted when a unit dies (HP reaches zero).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleEvents
files.Summary: Strongly-typed event payloads emitted by .

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleLauncher
files.Summary: Service that turns a into a running battle.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleOutcome
files.Summary: The outcome of a battle, returned by and embedded in the event.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleResult
files.Summary: Snapshot of a finished battle. Carries the data exploration code needs to award XP, drop loot, and trigger follow-up dialogue.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.BattleStateSnapshot
files.Summary: Snapshot passed to victory conditions on each evaluation.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.DefeatAllEnemiesCondition
files.Summary: Default condition: victory when every enemy is dead, defeat when every player unit is dead.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.DefeatBossCondition
files.Summary: Victory once a specific designated enemy ("boss") is defeated. Other enemies may still be alive.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.LogSeverity
files.Summary: Severity of a battle log entry, used by the HUD to colourize lines.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.SurviveTurnsCondition
files.Summary: Survive a number of turns, then victory is awarded regardless of enemy state.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.UnitSpawn
files.Summary: A single non-player unit to spawn at a fixed grid position.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.battle.VictoryCondition
files.Summary: Base class for victory conditions, defined as Godot Resources so designers can compose them in the editor and assign them to a .

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.items.IItemBehaviour
files.Summary: Strategy interface for item behaviours.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.items.ItemDefinition
files.Summary: Authored data for a usable item.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.items.ItemRegistry
files.Summary: Singleton lookup for item definitions and behaviours.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.items.ItemTargetType
files.Summary: Targeting pattern for an item. Mirrors TargetTypes but adds a "self only" option (most healing potions).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.items.ItemUseContext
files.Summary: Context passed to an item behaviour at use time.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.items.PartyInventory
files.Summary: Shared bag of items available to the player party during combat and exploration.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.items.behaviours.CleanseItemBehaviour
files.Summary: Removes every purifiable status effect from the target.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.items.behaviours.DamageItemBehaviour
files.Summary: Deals raw damage to every target.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.items.behaviours.HealingItemBehaviour
files.Summary: Restores HP equal to on every target.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.items.behaviours.ManaItemBehaviour
files.Summary: Restores mana equal to on every target.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.items.behaviours.PurifyingElixirBehaviour
files.Summary: Reduces the target's corruption by one level (down to 0).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.items.behaviours.ReviveItemBehaviour
files.Summary: Revives the target with a percentage of MaxHp encoded in .

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.progression.CharacterClassDefinition
files.Summary: Defines the progression curve and skill catalogue for a class (Combattant, Épéiste, Assassin, Archer, Mage-Fire, Mage-Water, ...).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.progression.CharacterProfile
files.Summary: Persistent state attached to a single character.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.progression.ExperienceCalculator
files.Summary: Stateless helpers for converting raw experience points into character levels.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.progression.SkillLoadout
files.Summary: The set of active skills the player has chosen to take into battle.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.progression.SkillUnlock
files.Summary: Pair of (level, skillId) describing when a skill becomes available to a class.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.skills.DataDrivenSkill
files.Summary: Concrete implementation that defers all logic to a + pair.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.skills.ISkillBehaviour
files.Summary: Strategy interface for runtime skill behaviour.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.skills.ScalingStat
files.Summary: The stat used to scale a skill's base power. The runtime behaviour reads UnitSystem.BaseAtk or UnitSystem.Intelligence accordingly.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.skills.SkillDefinition
files.Summary: Authored data for a skill (active or passive).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.skills.SkillExecutionContext
files.Summary: Context passed to a skill behaviour at execution time.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.skills.SkillRegistry
files.Summary: Singleton lookup that resolves skill ids to and behaviour ids to instances.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.skills.behaviours.CleanseBehaviour
files.Summary: Cleanse behaviour: removes purifiable status effects from each target. Used by Light spells like "Éclat Purificateur".

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.skills.behaviours.ControlBehaviour
files.Summary: Control behaviour: applies a stun / freeze / immobilize effect with no damage, or low damage plus the control effect.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.skills.behaviours.CorruptedConversionBehaviour
files.Summary: Corrupted-conversion behaviour: turns target ally into an enemy for a fixed duration. The hallmark Darkness-school crowd-control spell that also corrupts the caster strongly.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.skills.behaviours.DamageBehaviour
files.Summary: Generic damage behaviour: deals scaled damage to every target, optionally applies a status effect, optionally rolls corruption backlash.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.skills.behaviours.DamageOverTimeBehaviour
files.Summary: Damage-over-time behaviour: ticks initial damage then applies a DoT effect.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.skills.behaviours.HealBehaviour
files.Summary: Heal behaviour: restores HP to every target by the scaled power.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.skills.behaviours.ResurrectBehaviour
files.Summary: Resurrection behaviour: revives each target unit with a percentage of MaxHp. The percentage is encoded in as a value in [0, 1] (0.5 = 50% HP).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.skills.behaviours.StatusOnlyBehaviour
files.Summary: Buff / debuff behaviour: applies a status effect to each target without dealing damage. Useful for War Cry, Granite Skin, Hawk's Eye, etc.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.status_effects.EffectTarget
files.Summary: Base class for any entity that can receive and manage s. Provides default implementations for applying, removing, and querying effects.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.status_effects.IEffectTarget
files.Summary: Represents an entity that can receive and manage status effects.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.status_effects.StatusEffect
files.Summary: Base class for all status effects that can be applied to an .

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.status_effects.StatusEffectFactory
files.Summary: Creates instances from string identifiers.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.status_effects.StatusEffectSystem
files.Summary: Manages the application and lifecycle of status effects on all tracked targets.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.status_effects.effects.BleedEffect
files.Summary: Damage-over-time effect that prevents healing while active.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.status_effects.effects.BurnEffect
files.Summary: Damage-over-time + armor reduction effect.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.status_effects.effects.ConfusionEffect
files.Summary: Causes the affected unit to attack a random unit (ally or enemy) on its turn.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.status_effects.effects.CurseEffect
files.Summary: Permanently reduces one of the target's stats by a random amount.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.status_effects.effects.CursedStat
files.Summary: The stat a curse can target.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.status_effects.effects.PoisonEffect
files.Summary: Damage-over-time effect that ticks at the end of each affected unit's turn.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.systems.status_effects.effects.StunEffect
files.Summary: Prevents the affected unit from acting on its turn.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.ui.hud.CorruptionGauge
files.Summary: Three-segment gauge showing the active player unit's corruption level.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.ui.hud.HudBusHelper
files.Summary: Shared helpers for HUD widgets that need to subscribe to .

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.ui.hud.InventoryPanel
files.Summary: Modal panel listing the shared .
